description: A cinematic interactive narrative with tap-to-advance story pages, typewriter text reveals, choice points, parallax depth, and Ken Burns zoom. Premium Apple-keynote-level polish for brand storytelling.

colors.description: Brand color palette for all visuals and story pages

primary.description: Main brand color for backgrounds, accents, and CTA

accent.description: Emphasis words, highlights, particle effects, and glow

texts.description: All user-facing text strings including story page content

title.description: Brand title on the splash screen

subtitle.description: Tagline or subtitle on the splash screen

pages.description: Story page content array. Each page has its own headline, body, emphasis words, and background color.

body.description: Page body text revealed with animation

emphasisWords.description: Words within body text to highlight in accent color

bgColor.description: Override background color for this page

choiceA.description: Label for the first choice card

choiceB.description: Label for the second choice card

ctaText.description: CTA button text on the final page

assets.description: Mapping of brand assets to story roles

hero.description: Asset key for the hero/product sprite shown on story pages

logo.description: Asset key for the brand logo on splash and final page

backgroundStyle.description: Background animation style for each page

particleDensity.description: Ambient particle density throughout the story

transitionStyle.description: Transition style between scenes and pages

pageCount.description: Number of story pages to display (auto-derived from pages array length if omitted)

choiceEnabled.description: Whether the choice point page is included in the story flow

autoAdvanceDelay.description: Auto-advance delay in ms after page animations complete (0 = manual tap only)

typewriterSpeed.description: Milliseconds per character for typewriter text reveal

kenBurnsDuration.description: Duration of Ken Burns zoom effect per page in ms

kenBurnsScale.description: Target scale for Ken Burns zoom (starts at 1.0)
